# https://chudi.dev

## Author
- Name: Chudi Nnorukam
- Title: AI Visibility Engineer

## Site Description
chudi.dev is a public working model of AI-visible web architecture for human readers, LLM retrieval, and AI agents.

## Priority Pages
- Start Here: https://chudi.dev/start
- Topic Hubs: https://chudi.dev/topics
- About: https://chudi.dev/about

## Feeds
- Sitemap: https://chudi.dev/sitemap.xml
- AI Metadata: https://chudi.dev/.well-known/llms.json
- Full Content Index: https://chudi.dev/llms-full.txt
